name: Maudore Minerals Ltd.
summary: Maudore Minerals Ltd. acquires, explores for, and develops gold mining properties in Canada. The company has approximately 13 exploration projects. The company was formerly known as Maude Lake Exploration Ltd and changed its name to Maudore Minerals Ltd. in November 2004. Maudore Minerals Ltd. was incorporated in 1996 and is headquartered in Toronto, Canada.
